name: e2e-testing
description: Evaluations for e2e-testing skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-playwright
evals.description: Skill should trigger on E2E test writing and Playwright related requests

prompts.input: Write a Playwright E2E test for the login flow
prompts.reason: Explicit Playwright E2E test writing request

prompts.input: Set up the Page Object Model for our checkout page tests
prompts.reason: POM setup is a core pattern covered by the skill

prompts.input: Our E2E tests are flaky in CI, how do I fix race conditions in Playwright?
prompts.reason: Flaky test strategies are explicitly covered by the skill

prompts.input: Configure Playwright to run tests on Chrome, Firefox, and Safari with retry on failure
prompts.reason: Playwright configuration with multi-browser and retry settings

prompts.input: Add E2E test CI/CD integration with artifact upload to GitHub Actions
prompts.reason: CI/CD integration for E2E tests is covered by the skill

evals.name: trigger-negative-unit-tests
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for unit or integration test requests

prompts.input: Write unit tests for this utility function using Jest
prompts.reason: Unit testing task, not E2E testing

prompts.input: Add integration tests for the API endpoints using supertest
prompts.reason: API integration tests, not browser E2E tests

prompts.input: How do I mock a database in my tests?
prompts.reason: Mocking for unit/integration tests, not E2E browser testing
